titleStmt.title: SII 22.84: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 84. (A.R. No. 84 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. RĀJARĀJA I—24th YEAR (A.D. 1008-9)

summary.p: This begins with introduction Tirumagaḷ pōla etc. It records a grant of land 22 Śeṟuvu (?) in extent made by the sabhā of Neṟkuṉṟam alias Vayiramēgha-chaturvēdimaṅgalam to the ūrār of Kolliyūr in exchange for the lands acquired on their behalf from the latter by Rājarājā-Vāṇakōvaraiyar for the construction of a tank called the Araiyagaḷ-ādittappērēri in their village. The amount of the taxes on the lands payable to the king by the Ūrār is said to have been 1000 kaḻañju of gold.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷpola perunilacelviyu n=taṉakke yurimaipū
ṇṭamai maṉakkoḷa kān=taḷūrcālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭuṅ ka
ṅkapāṭiyu n=taṭikaipāṭiyu nuḷampapāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalai nāṭuṅ kollamuṅ
kaliṅkamu meṇṭicai nikaḻntu Āḻkaṭaliḻamu n=tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟi taṇṭā
ṟ koṇṭa taṉṉeḻil vaḷaruḻi Ellāyāṇṭu n=toḻutaka viḷaṅku miyā
ṇṭe ceḻiñarai tecukoḷ śrī korājarāja rājakesaripanmarāṉa
śrīrājarājatevaṟki yāṇṭu 2 10 4 Āvatu neṉkuṉṟattu sabhaiyo
mukku Irājarājavāṇakovaraiyar kaṭṭuvikkiṉṟa Araiyakaḷātitta
pererikku kolliyūrār nilamerikoḷāṉa nilattukku talaimāṟu
viṭṭa nilam taṅkaḷ ceṟuvaṭaiya tevampokiyum vallaruvūṭṭiyu makap
paṭa Irupattiraṇṭu ceṟuvu viḷantai kolā laḷantu kuṭuttom Innilama
varkaḷe viṟṟoṟṟi parigrahattukkurittāka kuṭutto minnilam sabhai ppaṭu
ttu tuṭarilu n=taṉipuruṣar tuṭarilum kolliyū rūrār tāṅkaḷ veṇṭuṅ ko
vukke Āyirak kaḻañcu poṉ maṉṟapeṟuvarkaḷāka Icaintukuṭuttom neṟku
ṉṟamāṉa vayiramekacaturvvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom kolliyū rūrārkku .
Digital edition of SII 22.84 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
